title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #12, Brook, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #13 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #12, Brook, Unknown person #10, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HOOO, WHAT A THING TO HAPPEN...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: For people other than "humming"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: that know our weakness to appear ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: HATE BEING AFRAID OF ANNIHLATION !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Such long stairways ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I see. Luffy was transported through here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If we follow this, Nami will.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Is Nami alright !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We heard it and came running.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That is... "Luffy's" voice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We'll tell you everything we saw!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ... It was a truly unbelievable sight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Bring more!! It's not enough yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: My, how much that special zombie eats!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He does eat quite a lot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Kumashi, why were you hiding the pirates!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oh... oh... but... that is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: NU!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hey you, Special Zombie!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Don't get so cocky !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'm really sorry ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: for everything he said right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: You!! Don't sell out your friends!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Listen, oz.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: UNDERLING? I don't want to.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I HAVE A DREAM!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: I've never seen such a zombie !!!

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #12, Brook, Unknown person #10, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken.
